command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.203 '
echo --- SET STANDARD PASSWORD ---
echo "jose:M3gh@n!97&" | sudo chpasswd
echo OK_PASSWORD

echo --- NOHOOK RESOLV.CONF ---
if ! grep -q "nohook resolv.conf" /etc/dhcpcd.conf 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "nohook resolv.conf" | sudo tee -a /etc/dhcpcd.conf > /dev/null
  echo ADDED_NOHOOK
else
  echo ALREADY_PRESENT
fi
echo OK_DNS_LOCK

echo --- CREATE REMAINING LAYOUT DIRS ---
mkdir -p /opt/moreno-ai/logs /opt/moreno-ai/state /opt/moreno-ai/backups
echo OK_DIRS

echo --- FINAL INVENTORY ---
ls /opt/moreno-ai/
echo ALL_SETUP_DONE
' 2>&1
